title: nasturtium americanum
intro: Nasturtium americanum, also known as American cress, is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright green leaves and delicate white flowers. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its high content of vitamins A and C, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nasturtium americanum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Nasturtium americanum can be prepared as a herbal remedy through various methods, including infusions, salves, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
